zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna de Nantwich於大約1306年出生在英國爾南特維其時，她的父親Nantwich21歲，母親Nantwich21歲。她於大約1322年與David Calveley在英國英格蘭爾布朗克斯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1355年在英國爾享年50歲。

German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna de Nantwich was born about 1306, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, her father, Nantwich, was 21 and her mother, Nantwich, was 21. She married David Calveley about 1322, in Broxton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1355, in Cheshire, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna de Nantwich est née environ 1306, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Nantwich, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Nantwich, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé David Calveley environ 1322, à Broxton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1355, à Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna de Nantwich um 1306 in Nantwich, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nantwich 21 und ihre Mutter Nantwich 21. Sie hat um 1322 in Broxton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom David Calveley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1355 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna de Nantwich è nata il circa 1306 nel Nantwich, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Nantwich, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Nantwich, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato David Calveley circa 1322, nel Broxton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1355, nel Cheshire, England, all'età di 50 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna de Nantwich(이)가 대략 1306년 영국 체실르 난트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nantwich(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nantwich(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1322년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브록스턴에서 David Calveley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1355년 영국 체실르에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna de Nantwich родилась около 1306 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Nantwich было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Nantwich, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Calveley около 1322 г. в местности брокстон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1355 г. в местности чешир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.
